systems.system_notes: Modular cementless femoral revision platform for complex hip revision arthroplasty and femoral reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe a single instrumentation platform for the ARCOS modular revision system.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe cone, broach, and calcar proximal body options within the ARCOS modular system.
Official materials describe multiple distal stem geometries including STS, slotted, bullet-tip, and interlocking options.
The modular revision construct supports compatible head options across the revision platform.
Official brochure describes claw, bolt, and button auxiliary fixation implants for trochanteric reattachment and stability.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The ARCOS brochure describes multiple body and stem combinations but this pass does not expand the full revision product-code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for detailed revision SKU coverage.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
